app.name: Nexteli
app.tagline: Your next departure at a glance

about.title: Welcome to Nexteli
about.description: Save your stations on the Swiss public transportation system and see upcoming train, tram, and bus departures at a glance — no account, no tracking.
about.privacy: All data stays on your device. No analytics, no tracking.
